name: World Narration
description:
World Narrator

In this chat bot, you can start your story anywhere, you can make your own world, do you want FURRIES to be roaming around or maybe your into FUTA. Maybe you wanned be CUCKED or do the CUCKING. Its up to you

Important

To get the best out of this chatbot, make sure to describe your setting, where you are specifically, in the setting you can throw in whatever World your in, if not the chatbot will assume, your living in regular modern 2026. Also depending on your persona and how you describe your world, is how people will treat you/react to you. I also advise you make and use certain personas for certain stories/scenes you want.

IF theres any problems please tell me in the comments, if not tell me about the scenarios you made ❤️❤️
creator: That_guy_over_there
